emails.subject: Re: South America
emails.body: Re: South America I have left a message for Jim. I will be getting back from working a week in the Portland office on Sunday, so we would have to leave on Monday. Are any other weeks after that good? Michelle Blaine/ENRON@enronXgate 05/27/2001 10:49 PM

emails.subject: RE: South America
emails.body: RE: South America Richard I think the week after that, John wanted to take vacation. Maybe w= e=20 should try for the first week in August. Its winter in South America and i= t=20 will be a good break from the heat. I=01,ll check with John. Otherwise we= =20 could do Tuesday- Friday that week of the 16th? That may be tough just=20 returning from vacation.
